input.command: curl -s -X POST "https://rpc.ankr.com/multichain" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ankr_getAccountBalance","params":{"walletAddress":"0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045","onlyWhitelisted":false,"blockchain":["base"]},"id":1}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assets=d.get('result',{}).get('assets',[]); [print(a.get('tokenSymbol'), a.get('balance'), a.get('thumbnail','')[:50]) for a in assets[:5]]" 2>/dev/null || echo "ankr failed"
input.description: Test Ankr free API for token balances
